fields.description:
## Context
DSO plugin maintainers and Claude Code agents are affected by the presence of the dead tdd-workflow skill. Maintainers bear the overhead of updating ~31 references across documentation, eval configs, and validation scripts whenever skill infrastructure changes. Claude Code agents reading fix-bug guidance are directed to invoke /dso:tdd-workflow for new feature TDD — a skill that provides standalone guidance without the structured red-test-writer/red-test-evaluator agent pipeline that sprint offers, resulting in inferior TDD enforcement for feature development. The skill predates fix-bug and sprint, which now fully subsume its functionality: fix-bug covers bug-fix TDD with investigation, and sprint dispatches red-test-writer agents for feature stories. The three core TDD discipline principles (RED-first enforcement, minimal GREEN fix, reject-tests-that-pass-immediately) are already explicitly enforced in fix-bug (Step 5.5 RED-before-fix gate), implementation-plan (TDD First directive, behavioral test requirement), and the red-test-writer/red-test-evaluator agents.

## Success Criteria
1. The plugins/dso/skills/tdd-workflow/ directory (SKILL.md, evals, prompts) is fully deleted
2. All references to tdd-workflow are removed from CLAUDE.md, check-skill-refs.sh, command shims, eval configs, and documentation files
3. validate.sh --ci passes clean with no broken references or missing skill errors
4. No other skill, agent, or hook references tdd-workflow after removal

## Dependencies
Relates to 83fc-81fb (RED test writer), which excluded tdd-workflow integration pending this evaluation. No hard dependency — these epics can proceed in parallel. After tdd-workflow is removed, 83fc-81fb no longer needs to consider tdd-workflow integration as a deferred concern.

## Approach
Clean removal — delete the skill directory, command shim, and systematically remove all ~31 references across the codebase. Run validation to confirm no broken references remain.

## Scenario Analysis
- validate.sh --ci fails due to stale tdd-workflow entries in evals.json (high, deployment): tests/evals/evals.json contains three test entries referencing the skill. Must be surgically removed.
- fix-bug SKILL.md retains tdd-workflow recommendation (high, deployment): fix-bug guidance tells users to use tdd-workflow for new features. Must be updated to remove this reference.
- examples/CLAUDE.md.example retains tdd-workflow references (high, configuration): Template files consumed during onboarding reference tdd-workflow but are not scanned by validate.sh.
fields.title: Remove tdd-workflow skill (dead code cleanup)
